s2.ptxt: Measure the resistance between the injector terminals.
If the result is not as specified, replace the injector.

atten2.ptxt: Keep the injector away from sparks during this test.

s3.ptxt: Connect SST (fuel tube connector) to SST (hose), then connect them to the fuel pipe (vehicle side).
Install the O-ring to the fuel injector.
Connect SST (adapter and hose) to the injector, and hold the injector and union with SST (clamp).
Put the injector into the graduated cylinder.

atten2.ptxt: Install a suitable vinyl tube onto the injector to contain gasoline spray.

s3.ptxt: Connect SST (wire) to the injector and the battery for 15 seconds, and measure the injection volume with the graduated cylinder. Test each injector 2 or 3 times.

specitem.ptxt: 76 to 92 cm3 (4.6 to 5.6 cu in.) per 15 seconds

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the SST (wire) tester probes from the battery and check the fuel leakage from the injector.
Disconnect the cable from the negative (-) battery terminal.
Disconnect the intelligent tester from the DLC3.
Reconnect the fuel inlet hose (rear fuel pipe) to the fuel main tube.
